data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Recovers After Significant Downturn
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the cryptocurrency market experienced a dramatic downturn earlier today, with major cryptocurrencies XRP and DOGE, both ranked in the top ten by market capitalization, suffering significant losses. XRP, with a market cap of $141 billion, and DOGE, valued at $29 billion, each saw their prices plummet by over 53%. The broader altcoin market also faced severe declines, with some assets dropping as much as 99%.

Despite the initial shock, the market is now showing signs of recovery, gradually rebounding from the sharp declines caused by the unexpected event.

data.title: Trump’s China tariff sends largest exchanges into emergency mode
data.description:

data.title: Can XRP Price Reach $4 as ETF and On-Chain Support Strengthen?
data.description:
Ripple’s token XRP price was consolidating within a tightening range in early October 2025 after months of muted movement. Also, SEC decision on XRP ETF would provide an additional push. Analysts said the structure suggested preparation for a possible bullish breakout supported by improving on-chain metrics and renewed institutional engagement
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/10/can-xrp-price-reach-4-as-etf-and-on-chain-support-strengthen/

data.title: Nobel Committee investigates itself after Polymarket predicted winner early
data.description:
Officials in Norway have announced that the Nobel Committee is now investigating how a crypto trader on Polymarket appeared to know this year’s Peace Prize winner (María Corina Machado, a Venezuelan opposition leader known for challenging her country’s regime) before anyone else, according to Erik Aasheim, spokesperson for the Nobel Institute, which manages the prize […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nobel-investigates-itself-over-polymarket/

data.title: Ethena Confirms Normal Operations Amid USDe Overcollateralization
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethena has confirmed that its minting and redemption functions are operating normally. The USDe is currently in an overcollateralized state due to additional unrealized profit and loss (UPnL).

data.title: Bitcoin crashes below $110,000 for the first time since February as Trump vows 100% tariffs on China
data.description:
Bitcoin continues falling off a cliff on Friday, collapsing to $109,444, its lowest level since February, after President Donald Trump announced the U. S. will hit China with 100% tariffs starting November 1. Nearly $1 billion in liquidations slammed the Bitcoin market within 24 hours, based on CoinGlass data, while Ethereum remains under $4,000 at press […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-crashes-below-110000/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation, Keyring Network Raise Funds For Tornado Cash Developers
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation and Keyring Network have launched an initiative to raise funds for Tornado Cash developers Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev amid their respective legal battles. Ethereum Foundation, Keyring Network Raise FundsAccording to an October 10 announcement, the two organizations have launched fundraising efforts to “pioneer open-source legal defense funding. ” The announcement also states that […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethereum-foundation-keyring-network-raise-funds-for-tornado-cash-developers/

data.title: Global Liquidations Reach Record High of $13.132 Billion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, global liquidations in the past 24 hours have surged to a record $13.132 billion. Of this total, long positions accounted for $11.826 billion, while short positions made up $1.306 billion.

data.title: Trump Puts Additional 100% Tariffs On China: Crypto, Stocks Drop
data.description:
President Donald Trump stated on Friday that starting Nov. 1, the U. S. will introduce new 100% tariffs on goods imported from China in addition to all current tariffs. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/news/politics/25/10/48162671/trump-puts-additional-100-tariffs-on-china-crypto-stocks-drop?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site
